items.hook: BCA has found that boutique condo projects have more construction defects than larger de
items.caption:
BCA has found that boutique condo projects have more construction defects than larger developments. If your handover is coming up, do not treat the inspection as a formality. Take your time, bring a checklist, and consider an independent inspector who has no stake in rushing you through. Run a free check on your project at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
建筑与建设局（BCA）发现，精品condo项目的建筑缺陷比大型发展项目更多。如果你即将收到钥匙，验房这一步绝对不能马虎。留出充足时间，带上检查清单，考虑聘请独立验房师，确保缺陷一个都不漏。免费查看你的项目资料，请上 propsight.sg，链接在简介。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: If you have ever wondered why your favourite condo sold out before you even got a ballot
items.caption:
If you have ever wondered why your favourite condo sold out before you even got a ballot number, you are not imagining things. Regulators are now looking closely at how developers and agents handle VIP access on launch day. Tighter rules could mean the ballot is actually fair the next time you queue. Check launch data and past transaction records for free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
如果你曾经好奇，为什么心仪的condo在你拿到抽签号码之前就已经售罄，你的感觉没有错。监管机构现在正在仔细审查发展商和经纪如何处理发布当天的VIP优先销售。如果新规定落实，下次排队时的抽签可能真的会更公平。到propsight.sg免费查看condo发布数据和过往成交记录，链接在简介栏。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Lentor Gardens Residences pulled in 5,000 visitors over one preview weekend, a strong si
items.caption:
Lentor Gardens Residences pulled in 5,000 visitors over one preview weekend, a strong signal of buyer appetite for this Lentor Hills launch. When previews run this hot, units tend to move quickly and final prices sometimes settle above early estimates. If you are serious about this project, get your financing lined up now before launch day. Run your numbers with the free affordability and loan tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
Lentor Gardens Residences 的预览周末吸引了5,000名访客，反映出市场对这个楼盘的兴趣非常高。预览人气这么旺，通常意味着单位卖得快，成交价有时也会超过初步指导价。如果你有意参与这次开盘，现在就要把贷款审批准备好，免得开盘当天手忙脚乱。你可以先到 propsight.sg 使用免费的负担能力计算器，好好规划预算，链接在简介里。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
